{
  "perspective": "Risk Manager",
  "summary": "Top 3 CAAs: Tax Professionals Inc. (best IRS compliance), Global Tax Solutions (lowest rejection rate), International Tax Services (secure data handling). All meet criteria but vary in risk profiles.",
  "key_sources": ["IRS authorized list", "Better Business Bureau", "Trustpilot reviews"],
  "gaps_in_current_canon": "No CIS-specific CAA data in IRS records; verification methods unclear for remote clients.",
  "proposed_action": "Audit Tax Professionals Inc. first; prioritize secure data handling for Azerbaijan clients.",
  "whistleblower_flag": null
}
summary: Top 3 CAAs: Tax Professionals Inc. (best IRS compliance), Global Tax Solutions (lowest rejection rate), International Tax Services (secure data handling). All meet criteria but vary in risk profiles.
gaps_in_current_canon: No CIS-specific CAA data in IRS records; verification methods unclear for remote clients.
proposed_action: Audit Tax Professionals Inc. first; prioritize secure data handling for Azerbaijan clients.
